abilities.name: Covered in Rats
abilities.text: Once per activation. When this model is dealt damage, it may kill a friendly Malifaux Rat within 3" to reduce the damage by 2.

abilities.name: Sack O' Rats
abilities.text: Once per activation. After this model suffers damage from an enemy model, summon a Malifaux Rat into base contact with this model.

actions.name: Infected Blade
actions.effects: The target gains a Blight token.

triggers.name: Quarantine
triggers.text: This model and the target gain an Aura (Hazardous) token.

actions.name: Mocking Miasma
actions.effects: If this action receives a raise, enemy models within 1" of the target gain a Blight token.

triggers.name: Rat Bomb!
triggers.text: Summon a Malifaux Rat into base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Sacrifice the Scurried
triggers.text: Kill another friendly vermin model within 3" of this model. This model heals 2.

actions.name: A Song for the Sewers
actions.effects: Summon a Malifaux Rat within range. For each raise this action receives, summon one additional Malifaux Rat within range.

triggers.name: Loyal Rats with Tiny Hats
triggers.text: Choose a Malifaux Rat in LoS. Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the chosen model, then kill the chosen model.

actions.name: Resupply
actions.effects: Draw up to two cards from this model's discard pile with values of 1-5.
